title: Vanilla deluxe
description: Newest version of minecraft with visual and a few qol improvments to make the game beautifull and clean. Should work on most servers
body:
The goal of this modpack is to make the base experience of MC the most beatifull and clean together with great performance.
This is achived with Modpacks, Shaders and Texturepacks.

**Note**: The modpack is intended to work perfectly on regular vanilla servers. Remember to toggle texturepacks, the addittional bush texturepack is very preformance heavy.

# Most notable:
##  **Mods**
- **Beauty:** Visuality, Falling leaves, Eating anim-, FPS-Model, NEI, Cave Dust.
- **Sound emersion:** Immersive Winds & Thunder, Sounds, Sound physics remastered, Presence footsteps.
- **Performance:** All the expected mods including Nvidium.
- **Utility:** Chest tracker, Autho HUD, Legendary tooltips, Item borders and highlighter, Jump over fences.
##  **Texture packs**
- **Beauty packs:** Better grass, Xali's enchanced vanilla and bushy leaves,
- **Animation:** Fresh animations.
##  **Shaders**
- **Three base shaders to pick from:** Complementary reimagined, BSL, Rethinking voxels.

Feel free to download your own mods, textures and shaders however you want together with this pack.

Also im open for any suggestions you can reach me on discord at: your_local_furrie
